narrative:
Precinct N. Ridgeville 4-F (precinct in Lorain County) has 955 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.6%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.3 percentage points.
